title: Add podman-remote-static target
body:
CRC Group wants to use a static version of podman-remote in order
to install the same podman-remote client on any Linux box.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

This PR is to master, the other PR is to V1.9.
@TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL I fixed the GO_BUILD and removed the need for a container.

LGTM assuming happy test
and Thanks for clearing up my confuzledness earlier.
